info.title: ATLAS — Market Intelligence Engine
info.description: Jhaveri Intelligence Platform — Market → Sector → Stock → Decision

get.description: Get all stocks grouped by sector with technicals and RS.
Get market breadth and regime data.
Get top RS momentum gainers and losers.

Get complete deep-dive for a stock with conviction pillars.

When ``include`` is supplied the modules are validated through the
shared UQL include layer (:mod:`backend.services.uql.includes`) and
surfaced via ``meta.includes_loaded`` per spec §18.2 — keeping this
fixed endpoint conformant with the §17/§18/§20 standard. Unknown or
deferred modules raise :class:`UQLError(INCLUDE_NOT_AVAILABLE)` which
the registered envelope handler converts to a §20.5 400 response.

parameters.name: include

schema.description: Comma-separated UQL include modules (spec §18.1) — e.g. rs,conviction
schema.title: Include

parameters.description: Comma-separated UQL include modules (spec §18.1) — e.g. rs,conviction

get.description: Get RS score history for a stock.

post.description: Spec §17.5–17.7. Accepts a full UQL envelope — snapshot, aggregation (`group_by` + `aggregations`), or `mode='timeseries'` with `time_range`/`granularity`. Every fixed endpoint under `/stocks` and `/mf` is a thin wrapper over this route, so any payload the engine accepts here is safe to ship.
Spec §17.7. Dispatches a registered template (`backend/services/uql/templates.py::REGISTRY`) with optional params. Adding a template requires no route code.

get.description: List decisions, optionally filtered by entity, user_action, or status.

put.description: Accept, ignore, or override a decision.

schema.title: Response Update Decision Action Api V1 Decisions  Decision Id  Action Put

post.description: Store a new intelligence finding. Idempotent — same natural key upserts.

get.description: List intelligence findings with optional filters.
Vector similarity search over intelligence findings.
Get a single intelligence finding by ID.
Liveness probe — process is up and serving requests.

schema.title: Response Health Api V1 Health Get
Response Ready Api V1 Ready Get

get.description: Get system status with data freshness info.
Log tail — last N lines from most recent orchestrator log. 10s cached.
Roadmap — parsed roadmap.yaml joined with state.db. 10s cached.
Liveness probe — process is up and serving requests.

FindingCreate.title: FindingCreate
FindingCreate.description: Request body for storing a finding.

FindingSummary.title: FindingSummary
FindingSummary.description: Response model for a single intelligence finding.

MilestoneResponse.title: MilestoneResponse
MilestoneResponse.description:
One R/A/G dot in the per-chunk process strip. `status` is one of
green | amber | red | pending; `detail` is a short hover-tooltip
explaining where the value came from.

ResponseMeta.title: ResponseMeta
ResponseMeta.description:
Response provenance + pagination meta.

V1 fields (data_as_of/record_count/query_ms/stale) remain present and
typed identically for backward compatibility (spec §SC-003). The
additional fields below are populated by `services.uql.meta.build_meta`
for V2 UQL responses; V1 fixed-endpoint callers leave them as defaults.

StockDeepDiveResponse.title: StockDeepDiveResponse
StockDeepDiveResponse.description:
Single-equity deep-dive response (spec §17.10 + §18.2).

Serializes both ``meta`` (V1 contract — frontend reads) and ``_meta``
(the §18 standard path that ``check-api-standard.py`` asserts via
``uql-04-include-system``). Both keys point at the same payload so a
response is loud about which fields are include-attached without
breaking V1 consumers.

TemplateRequest.title: TemplateRequest
TemplateRequest.description:
Body for ``POST /api/v1/query/template``.

``template`` is the registry key (see
``backend/services/uql/templates.py::REGISTRY``); ``params`` is the
builder-specific param dict (may be omitted for parameterless
templates).

UQLAggregation.title: UQLAggregation
UQLAggregation.description: One aggregation spec inside a UQL request (data-model §1).

UQLRequest.title: UQLRequest
UQLRequest.description: UQL v2 request envelope. Mirrors specs/004-uql-aggregations contract.

UQLResponse.title: UQLResponse
UQLResponse.description: Fully-shaped UQL response — records + total + provenance meta.
